form.formComment: Returns from a 60-day let-up. Most recently second last of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Bonelli with 61kg at $3.30. Before that 3rd of 10 at this track on January 4 over 1200m, 1.4 len behind Wave Of Glory with 60.5kg at $2.80. Expected to finish much closer.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Returns from a 60-day let-up. Most recently second last of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Bonelli with 61kg at $3.30. Before that 3rd of 10 at this track on January 4 over 1200m, 1.4 len behind Wave Of Glory with 60.5kg at $2.80. Expected to finish much closer.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 4th of 7 at this track on March 30 over 1100m, neck behind Volegov carrying 62kg at $6. The start before that 4th of 8 at this track on February 25 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Trois Sept Huit carrying 58.6kg at $101. Solid run last time and is a strong winning hope again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Racing well recently. At the latest run 4th of 7 at this track on March 30 over 1100m, neck behind Volegov carrying 62kg at $6. The start before that 4th of 8 at this track on February 25 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Trois Sept Huit carrying 58.6kg at $101. Solid run last time and is a strong winning hope again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride. Raced wide on the turn and into the straight.
At the 1000m, carried out by Sommerstern.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation 6th of 14 at this track on November 19 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Foudre with 59kg at $4. First up last campaign 4th of 10 at Durbanville on September 13 over 1250m, 1.2 len behind Astronomical Boy with 60kg at $51. Look for a bold run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resuming. Only had one start last preparation 6th of 14 at this track on November 19 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Foudre with 59kg at $4. First up last campaign 4th of 10 at Durbanville on September 13 over 1250m, 1.2 len behind Astronomical Boy with 60kg at $51. Look for a bold run.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start second last in a small field at this track on December 6 over 1000m, 6 len behind Catwalk King with 60kg at $8. Returned from break 4th in a small field at Durbanville on March 21 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind From The Island carrying 60kg at $9.50. Likely improver.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second-up. First start second last in a small field at this track on December 6 over 1000m, 6 len behind Catwalk King with 60kg at $8. Returned from break 4th in a small field at Durbanville on March 21 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind From The Island carrying 60kg at $9.50. Likely improver.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hanging out in the latter stages.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 4th of 9 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1250m, 2 len behind Fortune One carrying 59kg at $15. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Durbanville on October 8 over 1250m, 0.8 len behind Marcus Aurelius carrying 59.5kg at $8. Among the top chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Second run back. First-up after two months 4th of 9 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1250m, 2 len behind Fortune One carrying 59kg at $15. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Durbanville on October 8 over 1250m, 0.8 len behind Marcus Aurelius carrying 59.5kg at $8. Among the top chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, Wedding Vow rolled out and brushed the hindquarters.
Slow into stride. Also raced green.

form.formComment: First-starter by Canford Cliffs out of Jade Vine. Prefer to see him at the races before recommending.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Canford Cliffs out of Jade Vine. Prefer to see him at the races before recommending.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at Durbanville February 11 over 1250m, 2.5 len behind Klein Karoo carrying 60.5kg at $7.50. When resuming last campaign fourth of 12 at Durbanville January 17 over 1250m, 5 len behind Behave Harris with 60kg at $126. Can figure in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1). Resuming after a spell of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at Durbanville February 11 over 1250m, 2.5 len behind Klein Karoo carrying 60.5kg at $7.50. When resuming last campaign fourth of 12 at Durbanville January 17 over 1250m, 5 len behind Behave Harris with 60kg at $126. Can figure in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, brushed the hindquarters of Lady Of Fate.

form.formComment: Last start 7th of 9 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1000m, 4 len behind Galactus carrying 59.5kg at $7. The start before that 7th of 13 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 5 len behind Fast Train carrying 60kg at $15. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Last start 7th of 9 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1000m, 4 len behind Galactus carrying 59.5kg at $7. The start before that 7th of 13 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 5 len behind Fast Train carrying 60kg at $15. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.
